response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished senior full-stack engineer, but the profile does not match the core requirements of this embedded security/networking role. There is no native-level Japanese (a hard requirement and not listed at all), no demonstrated security technology experience (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption, tamper detection), no L2/L3 switch or embedded firmware work, and no Linux kernel source modification. C/C++ exposure exists but is limited and dated (National Instruments, 2014–2015), with the recent decade centered on TypeScript/Node.js/DLang web systems. The mismatch on mandatory qualifications makes this candidate unsuitable for the position.
strengths: Strong, long-tenured senior engineer with broad cross-stack experience
Some prior C/C++ work and Linux familiarity to build on
Demonstrated low-latency, high-throughput systems and testing discipline
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency (mandatory requirement unmet)
No security, LAN-switch, or embedded firmware experience
No Linux kernel modification; C skills are dated and secondary
